title: rourea coccinea subsp. coccinea
intro: Rourea coccinea subsp. coccinea is a plant species in the family Connaraceae, commonly known as a tree or shrub native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Rourea coccinea subsp. coccinea include its antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Rourea coccinea subsp. coccinea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
